name: Unbolck me
description: Unblock Me is a classic puzzle game where your goal is to free the red block by moving other blocks out of its way. Each level presents a unique challenge that requires logic, planning, and problem-solving skills. Slide the wooden blocks carefully and find the correct path to clear the way for the red block to escape. Can you solve all the puzzles?
instructions: Mouse Drag Touch ndash Slide the blocks harr Move blocks horizontally or vertically Blocks cannot pass through each other
